text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While everyone else is enjoying the holidays, the
Umamusume preparing for the Arima Kinen have
not a moment to spare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, that doesn't mean they won't be
enjoying this festive season. I tell Oguri Cap to
have lots of fun with her friends, but...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for you!
choice_data_list: Oguri?! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's supposed to be having a party with Tamamo
Cross, but for some reason, the room is covered
in holiday decorations.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I let myself in. I wanted to surprise you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's still going on. They didn't mind me slipping
out for a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After all, this is a very special time of year. I
wanted to spend it with you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I thought it'd be nice to chat before the big day.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I told everyone how I felt, and they happily sent
me on my way.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Actually, they were the ones who suggested the
decorations. I'm so lucky to have such great
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Not to mention a wonderful trainer.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Now let's get this party started!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What would you like to eat first? Creek gave me
all kinds of stuff to bring here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a proper look around me and notice the
ridiculous amount of food—cake, pizza, salad,
stew... and even amberjack.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you noticed? Good eye!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Inari brought it. It's in season, so she thought it
would be perfect for our celebration.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The flesh looks really plump and tasty, doesn't it?
Actually, yeah. Let's start with the amberjack.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
First, we need to slice it up and simmer the
head... Just thinking about how good it'll taste is
enough to get me going!
choice_data_list: Aren't you going to dress it?
Aren't you going to dress it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, right.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I don't think I know how to dress fish... Do you?
choice_data_list: With something this size, we should probably—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, I've got this.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If anyone can swallow a fish whole, it's me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so my evening with Oguri Cap takes an
interesting turn...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This sure brings back memories. The holidays
were always really fun back home as well.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The delicious food everyone made, the lively yet
meaningful conversations we used to have...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It was impossible to feel the winter chill with how
warm everyone was.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I feel just as warm as I did back then.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's like all my tension and fatigue have melted
away.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad to be able to spend this time with you.
I want to hold on to the warmth I feel now...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And use it when I compete in the Arima Kinen.
choice_data_list:
Let's take all our cherished memories out there
with us!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's something important I forgot. I
should've said this earlier, but...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so it is that Oguri Cap and I share a
heartwarming evening together. I'll take this
cherished memory with me to the Arima Kinen.
